description: Sector overlay for South African electronic communications network/service operators, telecom service providers, spectrum users, numbering resources, consumer service, device approval, and communications-data documentation.

metadata.scope: South Africa-only sector overlay controls for Telecom. Intended to be used with south_africa_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official South African statutes, regulators, guidance, and sector sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: ICASA telecommunications mandate and Electronic Communications Act framework
Protection of Personal Information Act, 2013
primary_sources.issuer: Information Regulator / Republic of South Africa

rules.title: ECNS/ECS licence or ICASA authorization evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for electronic communications network/service licence, class licence, individual licence, ICASA approval, or licence-condition evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: ICASA telecommunications mandate / Electronic Communications Act

rules.title: Radio-frequency spectrum or type-approval evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for spectrum licence, frequency assignment, radio apparatus, type approval, or equipment authorization evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: ICASA spectrum and equipment approval framework

rules.title: Numbering resource or subscriber service evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for numbering plan, number allocation, number portability, SIM, subscriber, or short-code controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Telecom consumer protection or quality-of-service evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for billing complaint, QoS, coverage, service activation, transfer, suspension, or customer redress evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Subscriber privacy and communications-data safeguards are present
rules.summary: Checks for POPIA, subscriber data, consent, direct marketing, confidentiality, or information-security safeguards.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
